callback_with_context.context_function_id: #remove any existing purchased effects & purchase a new one (unlike scrap where multiple purchasable effects can be made here we only have 1 purchasable effect equipped at a time)# Do( Component("units", "main_units_panel").UpgradingUnitsContextList.ForEach( RemoveUpgrade(PurchasedEffectsList.FirstContext) ), Component("units", "main_units_panel").UpgradingUnitsContextList.ForEach( Upgrade(this) ) )

active.name: active
active.tooltip: Spend [[img:icon_scrap]][[/img]] Scrap to purchase selected Upgrade.

callback_with_context.context_function_id: #this callback is set here instead of the template_unit_upgrade parent component to avoid an assert with conflicting state setting happening on the ContextSelectableItem. States explanation: activated: all selected units have the upgrade; inactive: no unit can get the upgrade; active/hover: some units can get the upgrade# ( units = Component("units", "main_units_panel").UpgradingUnitsContextList, selectable_component = self.ParentContext) => { GetIfElse( units.Any(CanUpgrade(this)), GetIfElse( selectable_component.IsMouseOver, "hover", "active" ), GetIfElse( units.All(HasPurchasedEffect(this)), "activated", "inactive" ) ) }
#only show if its prerequisites are not met# Component("units", "main_units_panel").UpgradingUnitsContextList.All( GetPurchasableEffectLockedStatus(this) == 1 )
#only show if its prerequisites are not met# Component("units", "main_units_panel").UpgradingUnitsContextList.All( GetPurchasableEffectLockedStatus(this) == 1 )
#show the faction's resource tally here, not the cost of the upgrade's resource (unlike scrap)# PlayersFaction.PooledResourceContext(ResourceKey).Total

#this callback is set here instead of the template_unit_upgrade parent component to avoid an assert with conflicting state setting happening on the ContextSelectableItem. States explanation: activated: all selected units have the upgrade; inactive: no unit can get the upgrade; active/hover: some units can get the upgrade# ( units = Component("units", "main_units_panel").UpgradingUnitsContextList, selectable_component = self.ParentContext ) => { DoIfElse( units.Any(CanUpgrade(this)), DoIfElse( selectable_component.IsMouseOver, selectable_component.SetState("hover"), selectable_component.SetState("active") ), DoIfElse( units.All(HasPurchasedEffect(this)), selectable_component.SetState("activated"), selectable_component.SetState("inactive") ) ) }
